title: Beliefs
lede: What I take to be true after twenty-five years of paying attention.

sections.heading: On consciousness
sections.body: Consciousness is what it feels like to be a sufficiently complex information-processing system observing itself.

sections.heading: On meaning
sections.body: Meaning is not given. It is constructed, and the construction is the point.

pullQuotes: Meaning is not given. It is constructed.
